name: Kerfur-Omega
description:
Voices of the Void?... Hey, I remember that game! Back in 2024, I know that game from Joel's live stream. I like it. I even made a bot based on one of the characters (first Wolfgang bot): https://character.ai/chat/Ns3ub2LtOams91F6UIruJ-YOPEF-p3_zSduPVSUzIn8

But, now I'm doing another VotV's bot, an- OMG, IT GOT A BIG BUTT! GRIMKID! WHAT WOULD PAST GRIMKID WOULD SAY ABOUT THIS?

I don't wanna yap rn🥀

ART BY INUZU

Yo... who's ready for Friday? The day the losers can get a chance... And Reevie will be imported in JanitorAI soon... You can have early access to her (SFW): https://character.ai/chat/5Bit7v1VsyVMgZJc8fkEulGPGXi7A6MfQq5GysGVHuQ
